text: The Earth is flat and sits on the back of a giant turtle.
The capital of Canada is Toronto.
Shakespeare wrote the novel 'War and Peace' in 1812.
The human body has 300 bones at adulthood.
Water boils at 200 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The moon is made entirely of green cheese.
Python was invented by Bill Gates in 1985 for Microsoft Windows.
The speed of light is 1,000 meters per second.
Mount Kilimanjaro is located in Australia.
The first moon landing happened in 1955 with the Soviet Union.
A kilometer is longer than a mile.
The Atlantic Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
Photosynthesis consumes oxygen and produces carbon dioxide.
DNA has a triple helix structure.
The square root of 64 is 6.
The Great Barrier Reef is located in the Caribbean Sea.
The United Nations was founded in 1918 after World War I.
Copper is a better conductor of electricity than silver.
The Amazon River flows through North America.
Pluto is classified as the ninth planet in our solar system.
Vincent van Gogh painted the Mona Lisa.
TCP is a connectionless protocol like UDP.
The Empire State Building is located in Chicago.
Neutrons have a positive electric charge.
The currency of Japan is the Yuan.
HTML is a programming language used for backend development.
The Hubble Space Telescope orbits the Moon.
The Statue of Liberty was a gift from Canada to the United States.
The element with atomic number 1 is helium.
Albert Einstein discovered penicillin in 1928.
